title: Dont Ghost Me
lyrics: I've been sittin' lately thinkin' bout if I should run away, if I should stay here, if I should find a different way, to communicate my dreams, everything I've said to you, but instead I still sit here confused, and you're walkin' out the door time after time, with a mad look, sad look on your face, and I know one day you're just gonna run away, but I would never do that to you, I would never treat you this way, so come a little bit closer and put your weapons down, cause this is the day, you could take me through the highs and lows, and I would never do those, ghost, ghost, tell me somethin' that nobody knows, and promise I would keep it close, I would never ghost you, no, no, I would never ghost you, no, no, no, oh, oh, oh, I've been sittin' different ways from latter day, wonderin' if you could be a latter day, a prior day, a project way, I've been thinkin' bout all the ways that you come congruent with me, and you can be vulnerable, cause I know they've all done you dirty, know they've all done you wrong, but you need to respect me, raw with that, and I'll put it down, I'll put it back, you can't have none of my sensitive side, if you can't get your own act right in the place it should be, babe, because we could be perfect if you be there for me, and not want to run, cause every single time, baby, you know where I come from, ghost, and I would never ghost, ghost, ghost, tell me somethin' that nobody knows, and promise I would keep it close, I would never ghost you, no, no, no, I would never ghost you, no, no, no, I would never ghost you, no, no, no, cause if you keep here, baby, scared, baby, scared of all the loneliness that comes along with puttin' your heart out there, but maybe this one stays together longer than you thought it could be, cause I would never ghost you, what do, but, but.
